---
title: "Boltzmann simulation"
description: "Particle-in-a-box (PIB) simulation written in C with C++ graphics animator. Uses event-driven programming."
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/pablo-mas/
    affiliation: MSc student at ESPCI Paris - PSL
    affiliation-url: https://www.espci.psl.eu/en/
  - name: Jean-Guillaume Brasier
    affiliation: MSc student at ESPCI Paris - PSL
    affiliation-url: https://www.espci.psl.eu/en/
date: 05-13-2019
categories: [C, Thermodynamics, University project] # self-defined categories
image: boltzmann-simulation.png
filename: cv
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---

<style> button { border: 1px solid black; border-radius: 5px; padding: 8px 15px; font-size: 20px; } button a { color: black; text-decoration: none; filter: invert(0%); transition: filter 1000000s; font-weight: bold; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; } button a img { margin-right: 8px; } button:hover { background-color: black; border-color: white; } button:hover a { color: white; filter: invert(100%); } button:hover a img { filter: invert(100%); } </style> <button> <a href="c-mas-brasier.pdf" download> <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/482/482216.png" alt="PDF icon" width="30px"> PDF </a> </button> <style> button { border: 1px solid black; border-radius: 5px; padding: 8px 15px; font-size: 20px; } button a { color: black; text-decoration: none; filter: invert(0%); transition: filter 1000000s; font-weight: bold; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; } button a img { margin-right: 8px; } button:hover { background-color: black; border-color: white; } button:hover a { color: white; filter: invert(100%); } button:hover a img { filter: invert(100%); } </style> <button> <a href="https://github.com/pablo-mas/boltzmann-simulation"  target="_blank"> <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2111/2111432.png" alt="GitHub icon" width="30px"> Repository </a> </button>
